frayer_barnum_effect.title: Frayer Vocabulary Organizer
frayer_barnum_effect.subtitle: Barnum Effect
frayer_barnum_effect.directions: Use each box to show that you understand the word. Focus on meaning, examples, non-examples, and an accurate sentence.
success_criteria: I wrote the meaning in my own words.
My sentence shows the word accurately.

prefix_root_practice.title: Word Study: Prefix + Root
prefix_root_practice.subtitle: Break the word before guessing the meaning
prefix_root_practice.directions: Break each word into parts before guessing the meaning. Use the word parts to make a meaning prediction.
success_criteria: I marked the prefix and root or base.
I used word parts to predict meaning.
I used one word in a clear sentence.

vocabulary_cards_long_way_down.title: Vocabulary Cards
vocabulary_cards_long_way_down.subtitle: Meaning, word-part clue, and original sentence
vocabulary_cards_long_way_down.directions: Add a meaning, clue, and original sentence for each word. Cut apart or fold the cards for review.

words.definition: a force or stress that pushes someone

success_criteria: Each card has a clue or sentence.
I can explain the word without only reading the card.
